top_findings: Network reviewer found 65 SSH cross-sensor duplicate flows where DMZ duration equals core duration plus exactly 0.750000 seconds with identical byte counts.
Host/EDR reviewer found repeated polkit action/program mismatches, such as timedatectl requesting reboot or PackageKit actions and nmcli requesting timedate actions.
Detection reviewer found CRON/sysstat messages with randomized seconds, which is source-native wrong for cron-originated jobs.
Detection reviewer found Linux ECAR process telemetry often records only the terminal side of shell pipelines, such as head or tail, without the left-hand command.
Threat reviewer found File-SRV 17:01 svc_mhsync host activity without a contemporaneous workstation-to-file-server Zeek flow.
